title: lathyrus macrorrhizus var. divaricatus
intro: Lathyrus macrorrhizus var. divaricatus is a variety of the Lathyrus macrorrhizus plant, commonly known as the large white pea or the white pea vetch. This plant is a type of perennial legume that belongs to the Fabaceae family. The medicinal properties of Lathyrus macrorrhizus var. divaricatus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and provide relief from respiratory issues, and it can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in traditional medicine.
